texto: Actuality is when the lighthouse is dark between flashes: it is the instant between the ticks of the watch: it is a void interval slipping forever through time: the rupture between past and future: the gap at the poles of the revolving magnetic field, infinitesimally small but ultimately real. It is the interchronic pause when nothing is happening. It is the void between events.
explicacao: Citação de George Kubler sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Actuality is when the lighthouse is dark between flashes: it is the instant between the ticks of …” articula tempo, change, interval em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e reflexao-noturna.
